allow: Bash(node -e "const s=require\('./coverage/coverage-summary.json'\); const t=s.total; console.log\('Total lines:', t.lines.pct + '%'\); console.log\('Total statements:', t.statements.pct + '%'\); Object.entries\(s\).filter\(\([k]\)=>k!=='total'\).forEach\(\([f,d]\)=>console.log\(f, d.lines.pct+'%'\)\)")
Bash(node -e "const d=JSON.parse\(require\('fs'\).readFileSync\('/dev/stdin','utf8'\)\); console.log\('convention:', d.convention, '| testDir:', d.testDir, '| example:', d.example\)")

Bash(node -e "const d=JSON.parse\(require\('fs'\).readFileSync\('scripts/test-pattern.json','utf8'\)\); console.log\('convention:', d.convention\); console.log\('testDir:', d.testDir\); console.log\('suffix:', d.suffix\); console.log\('example:', d.example\)")
